\tzpentry{ID5517}{Theta Parametrization}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5517 introduces Theta Parametrization as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \hat{\mathbf{n}}(t) = \hat{\mathbf{n}}(\Theta(t),\Phi(t)) = \begin{pmatrix} \sin\Theta(t)\cos\Phi(t) \\ \sin\Theta(t)\sin\Phi(t) \\ \cos\Theta(t) \end{pmatrix}. \end{equation}
